title: [codereview-P2] Redundant ccp15/ccp_load_balancing_document defs duplicate ccp_document structure
description: The added document defs for ccp15 and ccp_load_balancing are nearly identical to the enveloped branch in ccp_document and use the same ccp_vector. This violates DRY and the 'per-vector-family branches' intent in schema description. Prefer specific vector schemas with tailored 'required' fields per CCP variant or consolidate. Follows existing pattern in other document defs but over-general here. Independent oracle: JSON Schema best practices for oneOf. Parent: project-LICHEN-pgzj.1
close_reason: Standardized to hash_32, added CCP-12 TOC anchor and section, simplified schema by removing redundant ccp15/ccp16_vector defs (now uses ccp_vector with oneOf/tailored description). Completed 3 codereview passes with all findings fixed and closed. No open findings remain.
